prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次为 8514→14281→9840→13149→12790，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025 年基准约 12790 名，近 3 年波动幅度约 3000–4000 名，位次稳定性一般；该校在山西省物理类（含理科）招生计划：2021 年 96 人、2022–2024 年各 92 人、2025 年 97 人；2026 年计划 105 人，较 2025 年扩招 8 人（+8.2%），扩招幅度明显，按供需弹性推算位次将有所后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 63 名，近年排名稳定在 60–65 区间，属于中上水平 211；该校在近年声誉监测中未见明显负面或正面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第 52（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，反映报考关注度尚可；投档线异常记录中未出现河海大学，录取走势平稳；水利工程获评 A+（全国顶尖），土木工程 A，环境科学与工程 A；水利类、土木类等王牌专业对高分考生有较强吸引力，支撑学校整体报考热度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、电气、人工智能等工科专业社会热度持续较高；山西省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年减少约 5928 人（-3.4%），考生总数小幅下降，竞争压力略有缓解；河海大学位于江苏南京，地处长三角核心城市，对山西省考生有较强地 域吸引力；该校在山西招生规模适中，无显著地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年扩招 8.2% 导致位次后移、山西省物理类考生减少 3.4% 部分对冲扩招效应、学校声誉平稳且工科专业热度持续等因素，在 2025 年基准 12790 名基础上预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约 13373 名，区间 12873–13873 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 12873–13873 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（水利水电、软件工程、通信工程等），一档专业（水利类大禹班、计算机、电气）作为冲刺，三档专业（土木、材料、地质等）作为稳妥保底 。位次明显优于区间下限（<12873 名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>13873 名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 8514→14281→9840→13149→12790, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; the 2025 baseline is approximately 12790, with a fluctuation range of about 3000–4000 in the past 3 years, indicating moderate ranking stability; the university's enrollment plan in Shanxi for Physics Category (including Science) was 96 in 2021, 92 each from 2022 to 2024, and 97 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 105, an increase of 8 students (+8.2%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion, and based on supply-demand elasticity, the ranking is expected to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking is approximately 63rd in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 60–65 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; no significant negative or positive public opinion events have been observed in recent reputation monitoring; Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively popular), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention; no abnormal admission score records for Hohai University, indicating stable admission trends; Water Resources Engineering is rated A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A; flagship majors such as Water Resources and Civil Engineering strongly attract high-scoring candidates, supporting the overall application popularity of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence continue to have high social popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) compared to 2025, with a slight decline in total candidates, easing competition pressure slightly; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, in the core city of the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal to Shanxi candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Shanxi is moderate, with no significant regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 8.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 leading to a backward shift in ranking, the 3.4% decrease in Physics Category candidates in Shanxi partially offsetting the expansion effect, stable university reputation, and sustained popularity of engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 12790, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13373, with a range of 12873–13873.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12873–13873, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering, Software Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Water Resources Dayu Class, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Materials, Geology, etc.) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<12873), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>13873), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为 211、双一流，软科排名约第 63 名，以工科见长，文科规模较小，整体层次对文科考生仍有较强吸引力；该校近年声誉平稳，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度较热（总排名第 52），短视频曝光量中等偏上；投档线异常记录中未出现河海大学，录取走势正常；河海大学优势学科集中于水利工程（A+）、土木工程（A）等工科，文科专 业无 A 类学科支撑，但法学、会计学等专业依托学校 211 平台仍有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 文科类专业社会热度整体平稳；山西省 2026 年历史类考生约 63113 人，较 2025 年大幅减少约 21766 人（-25.6%），考生总数显著下降，竞争压力明显缓解；河海大学位于南京，长三角区位优势对山西文科考生有较强吸引力；该 校在山西文科招生规模较小，缩招后竞争格局可能变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年缩招 27.8% 导致位次前移、山西省历史类考生大幅减少 25.6% 进一步缓解竞争、学校文科招生规模小且声誉平稳等因素，在 2025 年基准 2238 名基础上预计位次明显前移；预测最低位次约 1895 名，区间 1395–2395 名。

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 63rd in the Soft Science Ranking, known for engineering, with a small liberal arts scale; its overall level still has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no major negative public opinion; it is relatively popular on Douyin (total ranking 52), with moderate to high short video exposure; no abnormal admission records for Hohai University, and the admission trend is normal; Hohai University's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering fields such as Hydraulic Engineering (A+) and Civil Engineering (A), with no A-class disciplines supporting liberal arts majors, but majors like Law and Accounting still have some appeal due to the university's 211 platform.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 27.8% enrollment reduction in 2026 leading to a forward shift in ranking, the significant 25.6% decrease in Shanxi History Category candidates further easing competition, the small liberal arts enrollment scale and stable reputation of the university, the ranking is expected to move forward noticeably based on the 2025 baseline of 2238; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1895, with a range of 1395–2395.
